ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team abbreviation */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team abbreviation */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season in which the game was played */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Total attendance for the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team FOREIGN KEY ("home_team") REFERENCES teams ("abbreviation"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team FOREIGN KEY ("away_team") REFERENCES teams ("abbreviation")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the team is based in */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head coach for the team */,
  "general_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the general manager for the team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is currently with */,
  "coach_type" TEXT /* Type of coach (e.g., head coach, assistant coach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience the player has */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team for the season */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played in the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistics record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which statistics are recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics belong to */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards by the player in the game */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns scored by the player in the game */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Total interceptions by the player in the game */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards by the player in the game */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Total receiving yards by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum seating capacity of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of officiating experience */,
  "referee_type" TEXT /* Type of referee (e.g., head referee, line judge) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season in which the tournament is held */,
  "total_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams participating in the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket sale */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which the ticket is sold */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the game is held */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of tickets sold */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number of the ticket */,
  "row_number" TEXT /* Row number of the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the engagement activity */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game related to the engagement */,
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan participating in the engagement */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement activity (e.g., comment, like) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the engagement activity */,
  "engagement_text" TEXT /* Text content of the engagement activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_fan_id FOREIGN KEY ("fan_id") REFERENCES fans ("fan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fans" (
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the fan */,
  "fan_name" TEXT /* Name of the fan */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fan */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Membership status (e.g., regular, VIP) */,
  "favorite_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan's favorite team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stadium is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum seating capacity of the stadium */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game official */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which the official is assigned */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee */,
  "official_type" TEXT /* Type of official (e.g., referee, line judge) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_officials_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_officials_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who suffered the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date for the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
